element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns that Kid Klown automatically moves down path and must reach bomb before fuse detonates

element_introduction_order.element: Obstacles that slow player on collision
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Multiple collision penalties accumulate; too many hits cause level loss
Player must find all 4 card suit orbs on first run to earn Honey heart; rewards perfect-clear runs
Each stage completion grants a key; keys determine final ending outcome
Player must select correct lock from 10 options to unlock Princess Honey; wrong choice leads to bad ending

typical_relief_triggers: Collecting all 4 card suit orbs in single run
Successfully selecting correct lock at endgame
typical_tension_triggers: Lit fuse automatically advancing toward bomb
Missing card orbs on current run (blocks Honey heart)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: High-intensity time-pressure mechanic with automatic downward movement forcing constant vigilance; tension escalates as fuse approaches bomb; relief tied to successful obstacle avoidance and time-critical resource collection

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Card suit orbs positioned as optional collectibles; perfect-run bonus (Honey heart) signals thoroughness-based progression

difficulty_curve.early_game: Stage 1 introduces basic mechanics with moderate obstacle density; learning curve for timing and collision avoidance
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Stages 2-4 escalate obstacle complexity and arrangement; card collection remains mandatory for optimal endings
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stage 5 culminates core mechanics; endgame lock-selection puzzle introduces binary failure point independent of skill execution
notable_spikes: Endgame lock selection (10 options, only 1 correct; no skill-based mitigation)
Hard mode requirement for second 50/50 ending chance (all cards must be collected in first run, no continues allowed)
Accumulated difficulty of perfect-clear requirement across all 5 stages for best ending

notable_level_patterns.description: Each stage tasks Kid Klown with pursuing a lit fuse down an isometric path while avoiding obstacles. Automatic forward movement creates time pressure; obstacles cause collision penalties rather than instant failure. Pattern repeats across 5 stages with escalating obstacle density.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stages 1-5 (all stages follow this core pattern)

notable_level_patterns.description: Within each bomb-chase, 4 card suit orbs are hidden. Collecting all 4 on first attempt grants Honey heart. Missing any blocks perfect ending; pattern reinforces single-life perfectionism across stages.

After completing all 5 stages (with or without all cards), player accumulates 5 keys. Endgame presents 10 locks; only correct 5-lock sequence unlocks Princess Honey. This single binary choice determines final ending quality independent of previous skill.

sources_used: tcrf (The Cutting Room Floor - Kid Klown in Crazy Chase article)
wikipedia (Kid Klown in Crazy Chase article)
